research_scope.venue: Binance USD-M perpetual futures public archives
research_scope.decision_clock: every completed 15-minute boundary after the first 10 seconds of exact aggTrades

data_contract.exact_order_flow: first 10 seconds of each quarter hour from checksum-verified aggTrades; aggressor side from isBuyerMaker
data_contract.public_state: contract 1-minute klines plus markPriceKlines, aggregated from completed minutes only
data_contract.missing_reference_minutes: drop; create a new segment; reset all causal rolling state; no signal or trade may cross segment
data_contract.entry: first exact aggregate trade at or after boundary+10 seconds
data_contract.exit: first exact aggregate trade at horizon boundary in production replay; current screen uses exact boundary entry series for time exit and conservative 1-minute protective stop
data_contract.same_time_symbol_tie: BTCUSDT before ETHUSDT after score tie

members.feature_group: all 74 frozen public-state and exact-flow features from evaluator hash 6394c6e...

exact_core plus q_ret, q_close_ret, q_imbalance, q_basis, returns 1/2/4/8/16/32/48/96, vol 4/8/16/32/96, RSI14, stochastic14, CCI20, MACD fraction, volume MACD, Bollinger z; excludes moving-average distance fields

arbitration.within_member_same_boundary: largest absolute prediction, then BTCUSDT before ETHUSDT
arbitration.global_slot: earliest eligible entry; skip candidates whose entry is before occupied_until

execution.stop_gap_fill: first adverse minute open if beyond the stop, otherwise stop price
execution.risk_note: 1% is reporting scale only, not optimized live risk

selection_bias_disclosure: Both members and the normalized arbitration rule were selected after inspecting 2023 discovery diagnostics. The first 2024 run is therefore a strict one-shot OOS; no parameter or feature changes are allowed after it is opened.

first_2024_oos_gate.on_failure: reject the dual-horizon candidate without refitting on 2024 and rotate hypothesis
first_2024_oos_gate.on_pass: perform candidate-day exact aggTrade protective-stop and funding replay before opening 2025
